name: GIMS - Google Maps Lead Gen (Serper + Code Parser)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, source: 'google_maps', keyword: $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.keyword, city: $('On Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.city, erp_result: $json }) }}

meta.notes: Serper.dev 2500 free searches/month at serper.dev. No AI/LLM needed — Serper returns structured data parsed directly by Code node. IMPORTANT: Use /webhook/ URL (not /webhook-test/) and Activate the workflow for full execution.
